debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
P : Euc(3)
⊢ ‖P‖ * nth_partial 1 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer pbar ε poly P pc) pbar.outerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotM₂φ P) (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
by_cases hP : P = 0
  · simp [hP]
  · have h_diff : DifferentiableAt ℝ (fun x : E 2 => rotM (x 0) (x 1) P) pbar.outerParams := by
      simp [rotM, rotM_mat, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail]
      fun_prop
    rw [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu_outer, rotproj_outer_unit]
    rw [fderiv_const_smul]
    · simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
      rw [fderiv_inner_apply h_diff (differentiableAt_const _)]
      field_simp [norm_ne_zero_iff.mpr hP]
      congr 1
      simp [rotM, rotM_mat, rotM₂φ, Matrix.vecHead, Matrix.vecTail, Matrix.cons_val, Fin.isValue]
    · apply DifferentiableAt.inner h_diff (differentiableAt_const _)
